reviewer: agent build+matrix pass (headless Chrome, real download+open-vocab detect, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: Two real on-device models compose: CLIP ViT-B/32 text tower (Transformers.js, Xenova/clip-vit-base-patch32, fp16) encodes the user's class names → txt_feats, and a YOLOv8-World-v2 ONNX graph (raw onnxruntime-web 1.21, Instemic/yolo-world-onnx) returns per-class boxes. Headless: fresh profile → Download → ready, then a real detect returned 4 boxes; console clean. Numerically pre-verified offline (fp16 CLIP matches fp32: cat 0.915 / remote 0.904 / sofa 0.764). conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: scratchpad/yw-verify/yolo-world-desktop.png, yolo-world-mobile.png
rubric.notes: Open-vocab: class set re-encoded at runtime, nothing baked in.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — REAL WASM run on the cats sample with classes [cat,sofa,book,potted plant,remote] returned output0 [1,4+N,8400]; decoded (class channels are probabilities, sigmoid baked in) + per-class NMS to cat×2 (0.92/0.91), remote×1 (0.90), sofa×1 (0.76), drawn pixel-accurate on the canvas. Output shape + semantics correct, not fake. conformance io-shape-semantic=manual (boxes+labels+scores for the supplied candidate labels).

At-a-glance declares both model ids linked to their cards (Instemic/yolo-world-onnx + Xenova/clip-vit-base-patch32), the real task (zero-shot-object-detection), backend (WASM), dtypes (detector fp32 48.8 MB, CLIP text fp16 127 MB), and the ~176 MB download. All inference runs in a Web Worker. conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): declares-model-id=pass, declares-task=pass, declares-backend=pass, declares-quantisation=pass, inference-off-main-thread=pass.

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows loader state download-required with 'Download model (~176 MB)'; after load the shared createModelLoader auto-inits to 'Model ready' with a 'Clear cached model' control + cache detail. The detector ONNX is fetched THROUGH Cache Storage (HF /Instemic/yolo-world-onnx/ URL) so model-cache scans it → auto-init on return, no re-download; CLIP is cached by Transformers.js. conformance shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual.

Agent verdict — streamed download progress (per-file %); a two-stage 'Loading text encoder… / detector…' status; Retry surfaces on load failure via the shared loader; inference errors go to a .status.err region the visitor can read; detector bytes cached in Cache Storage for offline reuse. Runs on the WASM path (no GPU) — the headless no-GPU run produced real boxes, so it just works without WebGPU. conformance live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual.

Agent verdict — the open-vocab CHIP editor (type a class + Enter to add, × to remove, Backspace to pop, all keyboard-operable with per-chip aria-labels), preset buttons, Detect button, live score-threshold slider (filters cached boxes without re-running), keyboard-operable dropzone + sample thumbnails (Enter/Space), and (wild) the A/B phrasing inputs + result cards all operable. Load-checked headless on all 4 ladder pages (chip editor present, correct initial chips 2/5/4/3). conformance controls-operable=manual.

Agent verdict — visible boxes are produced by the on-device CLIP-text→YOLO run (verified real output: cat×2 + remote + sofa on the cats sample; multi-model crop → real ViT ImageNet labels). Typing a class that isn't present returns zero boxes (no hallucination). No canned result anywhere. conformance no-fake-output=manual.

All sample/content images carry alt text; every button (Detect, presets, chip ×, sample thumbnails, A/B cards, object-pick) exposes an accessible name; the loader status is a role=status aria-live region; the chip editor is labelled via aria-labelledby and each remove control has an aria-label. conformance images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass, live-status-region=pass.

Agent verdict — desktop 1280×800 (light+dark) and mobile 360×740 DPR3 render with 0 horizontal overflow on the model page AND all 4 ladder pages (measured scrollWidth-clientWidth = 0 on both classes), legible text, wrapped at-a-glance table, chip editor wraps, slider uses min-inline-size:0 to avoid flex overflow. Screenshots reviewed (scratchpad/yw-verify/). conformance responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual.

Agent verdict — all inference (CLIP text encode + letterbox on OffscreenCanvas + session.run + decode + NMS) runs in a Web Worker; the ImageBitmap frame is transferred (zero-copy); class embeddings are cached so dragging the score slider or re-detecting the same classes never re-encodes text (slider filters the cached list on the main thread only). Headless: text 126 ms + detect 777 ms in the worker, main thread stayed responsive, 0 console errors. conformance inp-stays-low=manual.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use flexbox with flex-wrap + gap and set min-inline-size:0 on flex items with long/unbreakable content to prevent horizontal overflow; use logical properties.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the chip editor, preset row, sample strip, count chips and slider row are flex-wrap layouts with gap; the range input carries min-inline-size:0 so it never forces overflow; logical properties (inline-size/block-size) throughout the CSS.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: measured scrollWidth-clientWidth = 0 at 360×740 DPR3 and 1280×800 on the model page + all 4 ladder pages

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Give a canvas an accessible name/description so its rendered content is exposed to assistive tech.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the detection stage canvas carries aria-label='Detection result: image with labelled boxes' and the crop canvas is labelled; count chips + the See-inside table restate the boxes as text in a live region.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance images-have-alt/live-status-region pass; canvas aria-label present

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep INP low — keep heavy JS off the interaction path.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — CLIP text encode + YOLO session.run + decode + NMS all run in a Web Worker; class embeddings are cached so the score slider filters a cached array on the main thread only (no re-run).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: text 126 ms + detect 777 ms in the worker; slider drag re-renders from cache; 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks; transfer buffers instead of cloning.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the ImageBitmap is transferred (zero-copy) to the worker; the two-model download is streamed with progress; no synchronous decode on the main thread.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: yolo-world.js detect() transfers the bitmap; worker fetch streams with progress events

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible multi-value tag chip input for custom class names
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Make each chip removable via a labelled button, support Enter/comma to commit and Backspace to remove, and label the editor.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — createClassEditor renders chips with per-chip aria-label remove buttons, commits on Enter/comma, pops on Backspace-when-empty, and the container is aria-labelledby the field label.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: load-checked headless on all 4 ladder pages; keyboard operable

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a live-webcam wild demo for yolo-world (rAF-paced, off-thread) to showcase real-time open-vocab detection on video, as an additive new page.
Offer an optional q8 CLIP-text fast-download mode (smaller, slightly lower confidence) alongside the fp16 default, with an honest quality note.

summary: Revision-1 agent build+matrix pass for yolo-world (open-vocabulary detection): a real two-model on-device composition (CLIP ViT-B/32 text tower → dynamic txt_feats → YOLOv8-World-v2 ONNX) verified in headless Chrome with real open-vocab output (cat×2, remote, sofa on the cats sample with user-typed classes), light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (0 overflow on the model page + all 4 ladder pages, legible, operable chip/slider/dropzone controls), console + network clean. Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
